title: horkelia fusca var. capitata
intro: Horkelia fusca var. capitata, also known as the coastal horkelia, is a perennial plant species native to the Pacific coast of North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Horkelia fusca var. capitata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is sometimes used in traditional herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
